name: Yogurt-Curry Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the marinade ingredients with the chicken and refrigerate for at least 6 hours or overnight.
2. When ready to cook, preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
3. Bake the chicken in its sauce for 35-40 minutes, or until fully cooked and any germs are eliminated.
4. Serve with tomato chutney and over rice.
Serving Ideas:
- Tomato chutney
- Over rice
Notes:
This same marinade and sauce work well for a cut-up whole chicken.
